subject: Vice President Pence in Georgia: Fighting to Defend The Majority
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b97cc2cd76c4/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66327?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Vice President Pence in Georgia:
Fighting to Defend The Majority**_
Folks -

We had a great time with Vice President Pence in Canton and Gainesville today!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **As [Fox 5 Atlanta](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=36eb7962b8&e=02cd889ad3) reported:**
_With just a little more than six weeks until their January runoffs, Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue got support from one of the biggest names in the GOP. Vice President Mike Pence traveled to Georgia Friday to headline what the Georgia Republican Party labeled “Defend the Majority” rallies.

“It is great to be back in the Peach State!” Pence told the crowd gathered outside Chattahoochee Technical College in Canton. _

**PENCE → **
_“The President wanted me to be here today because we need Georgia to send these two great Senators back to a Republican majority. First because of who they are. Second because of all we've accomplished, and because the Republican Senate majority could be the last line of defense for all that we've done to defend this nation, revive our economy and preserve the God-given liberty that we hold dear.”_

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4b0b1a5670&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch Vice President Pence's speech.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=721ff6e447&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **PERDUE → **
_"Today we are the last line of defense against this country making a change to the left that we won't get to undo for maybe two, three, four, five generations. We cannot let that happen...Kelly and I are asking you to stand with us. And let's make darn sure that the road to socialism never runs through the state of Georgia!" _

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=30bc96d2d0&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch Vice President Pence's speech. ****Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=840779c35a&e=02cd889ad3) to watch full remarks from the event.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f60c70078a&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| _**Vice President Pence knows that we HAVE to win this election. And since Facebook banned us from advertising, we NEED your help to spread our message. Forward this message to 5 friends[to encourage them to donate to this campaign.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=ee495fd0ed&e=02cd889ad3)**_
** **
When COVID hit Georgia, David went to work to provide relief for our state, securing $47 billion for schools, hospitals, small businesses, farmers and communities, and accelerated investments in vaccines, PPE and testing.

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6d209fbc81&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch our new ad highlighting his hard-fought efforts.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1a3e486ce4&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Jon Ossoff and his backers would radically change America with their socialist agenda. We make this message clear in our new ad.**

**Watch the ad, “Total,”[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9dd5894ed2&e=02cd889ad3).**
_Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=99b4aab817&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9460dd0ee8&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=031bd2586f&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Today, the Washington Post[made some good points](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=26bb25dd3b&e=02cd889ad3) about Republicans plans for the runoff: **
_Amid the coming flood of campaign ads and carefully crafted messages, only one party is truly communicating the stakes of the election. It’s the Republicans.

They’re the only ones reminding voters just how important this election is, because if Democrats win both seats, they’ll have a Senate majority and Joe Biden might actually be able to implement the legislative agenda he was elected on, while if Republicans win just one of the two, they’ll retain control and will almost certainly bring about an era of unprecedented obstruction.

So what’s happening in Georgia, so far anyway, is a pair of races where the Republicans are communicating the real stakes, and the Democrats seem to want to make the race smaller._
---
| **_In the News_**
---
| **[Free Beacon:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6b93822c5b&e=02cd889ad3) Ossoff Dodges on Warnock’s Praise for Anti-Semitic Pastor**
_Senate hopeful Jon Ossoff, who has repeatedly referred to himself and fellow Democrat Raphael Warnock as a "team" in Georgia's Senate runoffs, dodged questions on Warnock's longtime support for anti-Semitic pastor Rev. Jeremiah Wright
...
The relationship between the two candidates could hamper Democratic hopes of winning a de facto Senate majority in January. During the same Wednesday event, Ossoff told reporters that he and Warnock are running as a "team," calling the pastor an "inspirational leader." The Democrat also called Warnock a "moral leader for our state and our country" at a Sunday campaign stop in Cobb County._
_ _
**[Free Beacon:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d8b28958c2&e=02cd889ad3) Omar Backs Warnock: ‘Nobody Can Serve God and the Military’**
_Rep. Ilhan Omar (D., Minn.) defended Georgia Democratic Senate candidate Raphael Warnock's claim that "nobody can serve God and the military" on Wednesday, calling criticism of Warnock's comments "a disgrace and shameful."

Omar—who has her own history of controversial comments about U.S. troops—came to Warnock's defense, after the Washington Free Beacon reported on his 2011 sermon in which he argued there is a conflict between serving God and the military. Video of the sermon drew sharp criticism from Republicans this week, including calls for Warnock to drop out of the race from Sens. Tom Cotton (Ark.) and Marsha Blackburn (Tenn.).
_ ###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates [November 20, 2020]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- In the United States, we recognize and carry out the results of elections. That is what must and will happen in Michigan and every other state this year — despite Trump’s efforts to undermine the election and sow chaos. As Republicans seek to delegitimize the results of this election, Democratic [Secretaries of State](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2a83467543&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Attorneys General](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c6c9dcb658&e=d6c5c7d7ec) along with county officials and so many others have fought back against these efforts. This is why, down ballot victories are critical investments in offices that play important local and national roles. And we are sending our full gratitude to those still working around the clock to hold our Democracy firmly in place.
With 31 Lost Lawsuits, Trump and Giuliani’s Legal ‘Strategy’ is failing. Trump and his allies know their lawsuits won’t succeed, so they’re trying to overturn the will of the voters. Trump summoned Michigan Republican legislators to the White House in an attempt to[ subvert the election](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f599de12a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and their constituents’ votes. He[ spoke with](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5ad75f2f81&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the Wayne County Republican canvassers who are attempting to[ “rescind” the certification](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4d4a758495&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of election results despite no legal way to do so. And, he fired the country’s[ top election security official](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=693ef3c787&e=d6c5c7d7ec), whom he appointed, for telling the truth — that this election was “[the most secure in American history](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d21be3c823&e=d6c5c7d7ec).” Trump and his team know they are up against a strict deadline for the election to be certified by the states. His tactic to [delay certification](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f20f8b5ba1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in battleground states has been [blocked](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c87431000a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) even by judges he appointed. U.S. District Court Judge Steven Grimberg noted: “To halt the certification at literally the 11th hour would breed confusion and potentially disenfranchisement that I find has no basis in fact or in law.” This week, Giuliani admitted their Pennsylvania lawsuit was “[not a fraud case](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=41a3101808&e=d6c5c7d7ec).” Trump and his lawyers have[ no evidence of widespread fraud](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e7e0ede518&e=d6c5c7d7ec) because none happened. Americans see through Trump’s lies:[ nearly 75%](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7e7d4a9108&e=d6c5c7d7ec), including almost half of Republicans, recognize President-elect Biden as the winner of the election. He won a higher percentage of the vote than any challenger to an incumbent president[ since FDR](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1ac40006ce&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and he won the highest percentage of eligible voters in more than[ half a century](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a8acb307c8&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Winning the White House was an historic victory, but there is still more work that must be done. If we are to enact bold legislation, Democrats must win the Senate. We need to do all that we can to support Senate candidates Rev. Dr. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff by volunteering, phonebanking, and keeping up the momentum to drive voter turnout in January. Visit [Flipthesenate.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f9e4d9bb3f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for more information! We are almost there! I hope you will support our efforts. Because together, we are making the difference. Yours in the Fight, Muthoni **In this Update**
* Georgia Recount Certification
* Georgia Senate Runoff Debate Schedule
* Applying for Jobs with the Biden-Harris Administration
* DNC Talent Bank
* Spring 2021 DNC Internship

**Georgia Recount Certification** The Associated Press has [confirmed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8acabcbdca&e=d6c5c7d7ec) that Georgia’s governor certified the state’s 16 presidential electors today. This was after the Secretary of State certified the election results in which President-elect Joe Biden is leading by a margin of 12,670 votes. **Georgia Senate Debate** While senate candidate Jon Ossoff will participate in a debate hosted by the Atlanta Press Club, Republican Sen. David Perdue has declined to participate. The event will proceed with Sen. Purdue being represented by an empty podium. The debate is scheduled for Sunday, December 6 from 5-6pm ET. Rev. Dr. Raphael Warnock and Republican Sen. Kelly Loeffler are scheduled to debate on Sunday, December 6 from 7-8pm ET. The debates will be available for viewers to watch on GBP-TV, [GPB.org](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=90230e3629&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and live and on demand on [The Atlanta Press Club Facebook page](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c64bfcd878&e=d6c5c7d7ec). **A pply for Opportunities within the Biden-Harris Administration** The Biden-Harris Administration is seeking to build a diverse administration that looks like America. It will take a wide-range of talent, ingenuity and creativity to meet the challenges we face as a nation. If you are interested in discovering how you can play a role, there are several career opportunities to apply for positions within the federal government. For more information about job opportunities click [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f5ebda0220&e=d6c5c7d7ec). **DNC Talent Bank** Through the DNC Talent Bank - we were able to match applicants with opportunities in Coordinated Campaigns across the country. Following the success of the 2020 talent bank - we have relaunched in advance of campaign opportunities in 2022 and 2024. To submit your resume and interest - [click here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dab990c68a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)! **Spring 2021 DNC Internship** We are now accepting applications for our Spring 2021 internship program. The program will run from February 1 to May 14 and be conducted remotely due to the recent event surrounding COVID-19. The deadline for applications is November 27. The DNC Internship Program provides a $3,000 stipend. Housing is not provided. Click [here ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8039a2b33f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)to apply.

Friend,

subject: Not on our watch, Peter

body:
The fight for control of the Senate is in Georgia and we know we can win.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899435:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)
_**" Now we take Georgia and change America." \- Chuck Schumer**_

Not on our watch, Peter!

The fight for control of the Senate is in Georgia and we know we can win.

[**Will you get involved and support my friend Kelly Loeffler in her Senate runoff in Georgia?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899435:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)
_****_
[Support Kelly](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899435:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)
---

**This is going to be a close, hard-fought race and Kelly needs all the help she can get.** Conservatives have a chance to return her to Washington so she can keep fighting for our freedoms and standing up to the far left.

**But Chuck Schumer and the Democrats are also throwing everything they 've got behind Kelly's opponent, and right now Republicans are struggling to keep up.**

[**You can support Kelly 's runoff campaign by donating $50, $25, $10, or any amount.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899435:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)

Don't let Chuck Schumer take the gavel and change America by reversing our conservative reforms. Democrats will take our country in the wrong direction.

We need to DEFEND Georgia and the Republican Senate Majority.

[**Help me support Senator Kelly Loeffler 's reelection and ensure conservative victory.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899435:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899436:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899437:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899436:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899437:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899437:siwTJMKNC:m:1:2247059263:E37C133DBA109B3BBEF60EBC28EFC401:r)

My very best,

Nikki Haley

_****_

---

The maximum allowable contribution per individual to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler is $5,600 ($2,800 for the general and $2,800 designated for a potential general run-off election).
A couple may contribute up to $11,200 ($5,600 for the general and $5,600 designated for a potential general run-off election) if drawn on a joint account and if this form is completed and signed by both contributors.
Federal Multi candidate PAC's may contribute $5,000 per election.
Federal law requires that Georgians for Kelly Loeffler use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.
Contributions to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals who are not lawfully admitted for permanent residence, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions are subject to federal contribution limits.

body: Peter, It's time for us to get MAD. This Election is unlike any we have ever witnessed. The systemic corruption is breathtaking. The mainstream media, the Left-wing academics, and the entrenched Democrats will all ask us to roll over right now. There is voter fraud in this Election that MUST be reported and uncovered. body:
I am warning you about this because it's critical you know the stakes. It's not just red or blue, it's pro-America vs. pro-Socialism. It's pro-police vs. an anti-police radical.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899673:WOSBBMK2N:m:1:2247059263:17D14D2ECD528233AD76399990ACD343:r)

Peter, I need to explain this.

I'm facing one of the most dangerous candidates in the country. Here is his record:
* Called police officers **" thugs" "gangsters"** and a danger to children
* Celebrated anti-Semitic pastor Jeremiah Wright who **blamed the U.S. for the 9/11 terrorist attacks**
* Champions radical policies that will turn America into a **socialist nation**

He's a radical liberal, and if he defeats me, he will have a powerful position in the Senate. [**Will you make a 6X MATCHED donation to stop Raphael Warnock from turning Georgia blue?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899673:WOSBBMK2N:m:1:2247059263:17D14D2ECD528233AD76399990ACD343:r)

**Frankly, he 's a radical's radical.** If he defeats me, he and his left-wing Democrats will have control of the Senate.

That's why I need your immediate support. [**Rush a donation to ensure Radical Warnock doesn 't flip Georgia and the Senate!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899673:WOSBBMK2N:m:1:2247059263:17D14D2ECD528233AD76399990ACD343:r)

If Democrats have the Senate, there is nothing standing in their way. **They will pass their extreme agenda, defund the police, and undo everything we 've accomplished the last 4 years.**

I am warning you about this because it's critical you know the stakes. It's not just red or blue, it's pro-America vs. pro-Socialism. It's pro-police vs. an anti-police radical.

Don't wait another minute to join the fight. [**Rush a 6x matched donation today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56899673:WOSBBMK2N:m:1:2247059263:17D14D2ECD528233AD76399990ACD343:r)

Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This Election isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great
body:
We can't allow the Democrats to get away with this. | This
Election is unlike any we have ever witnessed. The systemic
corruption is breathtaking.

Peter,

It's time for us to get MAD.

This Election is unlike any
we have ever witnessed. The systemic corruption is breathtaking.
The mainstream media, the Left-wing academics, and the entrenched
Democrats will all ask us to roll over right now. There is voter
fraud in this Election that MUST be reported and uncovered.

President Trump isn't backing
down - nor should he - but he needs YOUR help to keep going. He's
calling on a select group of his STRONGEST supporters, like YOU,
to step up and bolster our critical Election Defense Fund.

This is the moment that will
decide everything - will you join President Trump and FIGHT for
America's future?

He's even agreed to increase
your impact by 1000% if you ACT NOW.

Please contribute $45 RIGHT
NOW to the Official Election Defense Fund and to increase your
impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

The Democrats have absolute
contempt for the American people and believe we are so spineless,
so cowardly, so unwilling to stand up for ourselves that they can
try to steal the Presidency.

They're WRONG and we'll
prove it.

Contribute $45 IMMEDIATELY
to stand with President Trump and to DEFEND this Election.

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great
Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America,
and the Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth
Ave New York, NY 10022

We believe this is an important way to reach our
grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team.
It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

body:
The radical, Far Left is ruining this country. ANTIFA rioters are attacking Trump supporters in the streets and destroying American businesses. Democrats REFUSE to hold these left-wing rioters accountable. Our Senate Majority is the last line of defense.

**My race in Georgia will decide control of the Senate, and I won 't back down to the left-wing mob.** I need YOUR help to keep up the fight.

Joe Biden called ANTIFA just "an idea." Democrats will NEVER hold looters and rioters accountable for the damage they are causing.

I hope you'll stand with me against the Radical Left and their left-wing base! [**You can help me fight back by donating any amount today. Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler

subject: This is personal

body:
I represented Georgia in Congress for over 20 years, so this is personal.

Democrats are mobilizing their vast mega-donor network from places like California, New York, and Colorado. Chuck Schumer and the radical Left have already pledged millions to turn Georgia blue. We're running out of time to get our message out before it's too late.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: America’s security is at stake.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,
The lack of accountability when it comes to business in China has led to multiple holes in our national and economic security. China is one of the largest threats to our country, yet companies CONTINUE to partner with the Chinese Communist Party with no transparency or accountability.
_**If companies are going to work with the U.S. Government, they need to be forthcoming with the nature of their foreign entanglements.**_
It's VITAL to our nation's well-being that companies be transparent in their business dealings with a communist regime determined to overtake America. I promise you, Friend, that I will continue to hold companies accountable.
This is not going to be an easy thing to do. The last thing these companies want is to be forthright in their foreign affairs. I need as many people as possible to join me in keeping these big companies accountable.
Friend, will you sign your name to the list to help keep Americans safe by holding these companies accountable?
[**CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME TO THE LIST >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsCAhlXxsfk8UZ7anqadsVbmkNmX9RkjnE0tBfg2ZoMkcMNDvVI90klu-PSz4Jt26478PA-JqTyV786a_9WXygu3Bjx1OHrpqXWjerXEshITrD0J1Soj8h69RcGy4ioiyp9zmlFAJRjJ274RPspToi-S-EwyFHWQ4gTmOO1Mm-iKlII0-R_bJiydssFzJh9mUydzDaMABK5GNwh-Krn0EezsRg4Wfbo51HE_3BtOJ1XhXs6FmqecaYQK8N0BY3xGUeS8zUQXsr7jnMZksQC4jc14sxbWkdypdLM_IUhL50Hfv2MoPjUA1oXdffsulbN2TYAT_kSvXvRCfjdpTA7x8iI9wW_q-gT8N1HsjzIYg5oTJ7quptaSYIGAahus3qIdPQy57vtI8wNZnMG6-ly-0lUgWNKntz_YxkQVyyRs6THkkzpgklX-0DyQIKRr5NjpPCS8V3DMOlZIBmBRhO2p7A_a_ov7TRBW&c=7tteXmfNKSbkRcnyk6d4AY9k-k4rjMsN-mpDv2CBGs1QYZm19xJOXA==&ch=S-zCMJ0yjPj-9wbKIaGaso71X1VGw2hAEbQ4Y_9TJTBJZ-K2QGH14A==)
[**CLICK HERE TO HOLD THESE COMPANIES ACCOUNTABLE >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsCAhlXxsfk8UZ7anqadsVbmkNmX9RkjnE0tBfg2ZoMkcMNDvVI90klu-PSz4Jt26478PA-JqTyV786a_9WXygu3Bjx1OHrpqXWjerXEshITrD0J1Soj8h69RcGy4ioiyp9zmlFAJRjJ274RPspToi-S-EwyFHWQ4gTmOO1Mm-iKlII0-R_bJiydssFzJh9mUydzDaMABK5GNwh-Krn0EezsRg4Wfbo51HE_3BtOJ1XhXs6FmqecaYQK8N0BY3xGUeS8zUQXsr7jnMZksQC4jc14sxbWkdypdLM_IUhL50Hfv2MoPjUA1oXdffsulbN2TYAT_kSvXvRCfjdpTA7x8iI9wW_q-gT8N1HsjzIYg5oTJ7quptaSYIGAahus3qIdPQy57vtI8wNZnMG6-ly-0lUgWNKntz_YxkQVyyRs6THkkzpgklX-0DyQIKRr5NjpPCS8V3DMOlZIBmBRhO2p7A_a_ov7TRBW&c=7tteXmfNKSbkRcnyk6d4AY9k-k4rjMsN-mpDv2CBGs1QYZm19xJOXA==&ch=S-zCMJ0yjPj-9wbKIaGaso71X1VGw2hAEbQ4Y_9TJTBJZ-K2QGH14A==)
I'm a firm believer in Common Good Capitalism.
What does that mean?
It means businesses put America, its people, and its future ahead of short-term gains made by sending jobs, technology, and trade manufacturing to China.
It means the government puts dignified work, families, and communities ahead of maximizing the efficiency of global supply chains and financial flows.
It means all of us taking pride in our country, both what we have accomplished in the past and what we can and will accomplish in the future.
Not everyone agrees, though. Especially these big, multi-national companies that are headquartered in America but don't think of themselves as American. I will not stop asking questions and seeking answers from these big companies in order to keep you, your family, and your fellow American citizens safe.
This is very important to me, and I want you to know I am taking it seriously, Friend [**Join me in my battle to find the truth TODAY!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XsCAhlXxsfk8UZ7anqadsVbmkNmX9RkjnE0tBfg2ZoMkcMNDvVI90klu-PSz4Jt26478PA-JqTyV786a_9WXygu3Bjx1OHrpqXWjerXEshITrD0J1Soj8h69RcGy4ioiyp9zmlFAJRjJ274RPspToi-S-EwyFHWQ4gTmOO1Mm-iKlII0-R_bJiydssFzJh9mUydzDaMABK5GNwh-Krn0EezsRg4Wfbo51HE_3BtOJ1XhXs6FmqecaYQK8N0BY3xGUeS8zUQXsr7jnMZksQC4jc14sxbWkdypdLM_IUhL50Hfv2MoPjUA1oXdffsulbN2TYAT_kSvXvRCfjdpTA7x8iI9wW_q-gT8N1HsjzIYg5oTJ7quptaSYIGAahus3qIdPQy57vtI8wNZnMG6-ly-0lUgWNKntz_YxkQVyyRs6THkkzpgklX-0DyQIKRr5NjpPCS8V3DMOlZIBmBRhO2p7A_a_ov7TRBW&c=7tteXmfNKSbkRcnyk6d4AY9k-k4rjMsN-mpDv2CBGs1QYZm19xJOXA==&ch=S-zCMJ0yjPj-9wbKIaGaso71X1VGw2hAEbQ4Y_9TJTBJZ-K2QGH14A==)
I can't wait to see your name on the list.
All the best,
Marco Rubio

clean_body: Friend, The lack of accountability when it comes to business in China has led to multiple holes in our national and economic security. China is one of the largest threats to our country, yet companies CONTINUE to partner with the Chinese Communist Party with no transparency or accountability. If companies are going to work with the U.S. Government, they need to be forthcoming with the nature of their foreign entanglements. It's VITAL to our nation's well-being that companies be transparent in their business dealings with a communist regime determined to overtake America. I promise you, Friend, that I will continue to hold companies accountable. This is not going to be an easy thing to do. The last thing these companies want is to be forthright in their foreign affairs. I need as many people as possible to join me in keeping these big companies accountable. Friend, will you sign your name to the list to help keep Americans safe by holding these companies accountable? == == I'm a firm believer in Common Good Capitalism. What does that mean? It means businesses put America, its people, and its future ahead of short-term gains made by sending jobs, technology, and trade manufacturing to China. It means the government puts dignified work, families, and communities ahead of maximizing the efficiency of global supply chains and financial flows. It means all of us taking pride in our country, both what we have accomplished in the past and what we can and will accomplish in the future. Not everyone agrees, though. Especially these big, multi-national companies that are headquartered in America but don't think of themselves as American. I will not stop asking questions and seeking answers from these big companies in order to keep you, your family, and your fellow American citizens safe. This is very important to me, and I want you to know I am taking it seriously, Friend == I can't wait to see your name on the list. All the best, Marco Rubio == Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 == | | Marco Rubio for Senate | 228 S WASHINGTON ST STE 115, ALEXANDRIA, VA 22314 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: "Being a woman is a preexisting condition?" Read my recent op-ed >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/U7SV-62oN6ojQ3_D9YkdP3om9Yh1vdYEbzojn5E90ow=/7ZbrMmQCsb6PErM6hGU_LbSM9ppwgSXiMmgeCSMX06w=)
When the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed over ten years ago, I made sure it prohibited health insurance companies from charging women more for coverage _simply for being women. _
The Trump Administration, however, is doing everything in its power to dismantle the ACA, meaning women -- _particularly women of color_ \-- are once again at risk of paying higher premiums than their male counterparts.
[**It 's _critical_ Congress _protect_ the ACA and the millions of women who rely on it | Read my recent op-ed to learn why >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U7SV-62oN6ojQ3_D9YkdP3om9Yh1vdYEbzojn5E90ow=/BXHR8kHvGETrRg2Hj3lhVcsC1wlcMqggeqN-4VSTl48=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/U7SV-62oN6ojQ3_D9YkdP3om9Yh1vdYEbzojn5E90ow=/Cc45OnZnWjXp_WIluJZyAOpvCZZl-pMSYV97anoyLEk=)
When women are _still_ not guaranteed equal pay under the law, charging them more for health insurance is an absurd and cruel punishment -- but, then again, the GOP has a _long_ history of restricting women's access to health care.
We **must** protect the ACA from the Trump Administration at all costs.
We **must** fight for our mothers, daughters, and sisters' access to affordable health care.
And, we **must** stand up for gender equity in _all_ forms -- including in health care premiums.
Millions of women across the country are depending on Congress to uphold the ACA. We cannot let them down now.
Thank you,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/U7SV-62oN6ojQ3_D9YkdP3om9Yh1vdYEbzojn5E90ow=/wn3IDRPeh1BgbAEdc2uaZzoAyYwYqbtE_9kabEqDxGg=?refcode=X_112020_TheHillArticle)

_
The stakes are FAR too high for you to ignore this email, Friend. _

This Senate race is about more than just Georgia. [**Our runoff is the last line of defense against a far-Left, socialist takeover of our country.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1MPwXR-rRo44TkAN-CNhq4ywL-FCsfJe2k3M0vVC4YF2igF6C-iKVPlLqQ_tR7vBZaPXItoSg259ifCbFHP2ZEYxW1YI4gmqxGCpK6KM_GAuaSnEzII1-V485fdjhDweg8lTunfpW5bv5C3UNAAq6jEXZa14tivBXTlmwLsieyqP1ZoX8qUYuETzulXfsCQVTQydk3mfCX3pYFqEYdF233-_BLstJVaxKiPbT4B21o-s3q7Ac3GRUIU2YJWsSFcaWrzVI0cRna3Q7I3vVdBx0AffaQu62mSvLwtUoFXbHrNSJ47p_i-P-qCKzegtRHrwyelXYv5gi-BWhk2PT5H_8jRkWCLvbTp8GaocFMt9Gl9BKhHFio5OZiaSJqE-Fi6QorIg15dAHvmJfHFBNMwEkvbMY7tjr6vpkZu-huOGgPOPy77KEvGvw==&c=tNoZczjc4zQmlIal1tqmFRNsj3WzJS2Pks-9crdO7X8xb2CmKkTdZQ==&ch=HJ1_Vba0jJtVi_OA0OuRlHIBJgnFY0w15PeIXODfve0y1bld4kRTng==)

****[**SAVE GEORGIA - SAVE THE SENATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1MPwXR-rRo44TkAN-CNhq4ywL-FCsfJe2k3M0vVC4YF2igF6C-iKVPlLqQ_tR7vBZaPXItoSg259ifCbFHP2ZEYxW1YI4gmqxGCpK6KM_GAuaSnEzII1-V485fdjhDweg8lTunfpW5bv5C3UNAAq6jEXZa14tivBXTlmwLsieyqP1ZoX8qUYuETzulXfsCQVTQydk3mfCX3pYFqEYdF233-_BLstJVaxKiPbT4B21o-s3q7Ac3GRUIU2YJWsSFcaWrzVI0cRna3Q7I3vVdBx0AffaQu62mSvLwtUoFXbHrNSJ47p_i-P-qCKzegtRHrwyelXYv5gi-BWhk2PT5H_8jRkWCLvbTp8GaocFMt9Gl9BKhHFio5OZiaSJqE-Fi6QorIg15dAHvmJfHFBNMwEkvbMY7tjr6vpkZu-huOGgPOPy77KEvGvw==&c=tNoZczjc4zQmlIal1tqmFRNsj3WzJS2Pks-9crdO7X8xb2CmKkTdZQ==&ch=HJ1_Vba0jJtVi_OA0OuRlHIBJgnFY0w15PeIXODfve0y1bld4kRTng==)****
---
**The radical Left CONTINUES to gain momentum as they attempt to permanently CHANGE our nation with their DANGEROUS, liberal agenda.[**I 'm doing everything I can to ensure that the road to socialism NEVER runs through the state of Georgia, but to do that I need your help.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1MPwXR-rRo44TkAN-CNhq4ywL-FCsfJe2k3M0vVC4YF2igF6C-iKVPlLqQ_tR7vBZaPXItoSg259ifCbFHP2ZEYxW1YI4gmqxGCpK6KM_GAuaSnEzII1-V485fdjhDweg8lTunfpW5bv5C3UNAAq6jEXZa14tivBXTlmwLsieyqP1ZoX8qUYuETzulXfsCQVTQydk3mfCX3pYFqEYdF233-_BLstJVaxKiPbT4B21o-s3q7Ac3GRUIU2YJWsSFcaWrzVI0cRna3Q7I3vVdBx0AffaQu62mSvLwtUoFXbHrNSJ47p_i-P-qCKzegtRHrwyelXYv5gi-BWhk2PT5H_8jRkWCLvbTp8GaocFMt9Gl9BKhHFio5OZiaSJqE-Fi6QorIg15dAHvmJfHFBNMwEkvbMY7tjr6vpkZu-huOGgPOPy77KEvGvw==&c=tNoZczjc4zQmlIal1tqmFRNsj3WzJS2Pks-9crdO7X8xb2CmKkTdZQ==&ch=HJ1_Vba0jJtVi_OA0OuRlHIBJgnFY0w15PeIXODfve0y1bld4kRTng==)**

With a Democratic Senate Majority, there is absolutely NOTHING standing in the radical Left's way of implementing _their Green New Deal, defunding the police, packing the Supreme Court, taking away your 2nd Amendment rights, and MORE. _

**If Democrats take the Senate, America as we know it will be changed forever. **

Letting up now means that control of our country falls into the hands of Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, Stacey Abrams, and the rest of the radical, socialist Left. _Is that what you want, Friend? _**

[**I 'm counting on your help TODAY to save Georgia and save America. The stakes have NEVER been higher.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1MPwXR-rRo44TkAN-CNhq4ywL-FCsfJe2k3M0vVC4YF2igF6C-iKVPlLqQ_tR7vBZaPXItoSg259ifCbFHP2ZEYxW1YI4gmqxGCpK6KM_GAuaSnEzII1-V485fdjhDweg8lTunfpW5bv5C3UNAAq6jEXZa14tivBXTlmwLsieyqP1ZoX8qUYuETzulXfsCQVTQydk3mfCX3pYFqEYdF233-_BLstJVaxKiPbT4B21o-s3q7Ac3GRUIU2YJWsSFcaWrzVI0cRna3Q7I3vVdBx0AffaQu62mSvLwtUoFXbHrNSJ47p_i-P-qCKzegtRHrwyelXYv5gi-BWhk2PT5H_8jRkWCLvbTp8GaocFMt9Gl9BKhHFio5OZiaSJqE-Fi6QorIg15dAHvmJfHFBNMwEkvbMY7tjr6vpkZu-huOGgPOPy77KEvGvw==&c=tNoZczjc4zQmlIal1tqmFRNsj3WzJS2Pks-9crdO7X8xb2CmKkTdZQ==&ch=HJ1_Vba0jJtVi_OA0OuRlHIBJgnFY0w15PeIXODfve0y1bld4kRTng==) **
**[**SAVE GEORGIA - SAVE THE SENATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1MPwXR-rRo44TkAN-CNhq4ywL-FCsfJe2k3M0vVC4YF2igF6C-iKVPlLqQ_tR7vBZaPXItoSg259ifCbFHP2ZEYxW1YI4gmqxGCpK6KM_GAuaSnEzII1-V485fdjhDweg8lTunfpW5bv5C3UNAAq6jEXZa14tivBXTlmwLsieyqP1ZoX8qUYuETzulXfsCQVTQydk3mfCX3pYFqEYdF233-_BLstJVaxKiPbT4B21o-s3q7Ac3GRUIU2YJWsSFcaWrzVI0cRna3Q7I3vVdBx0AffaQu62mSvLwtUoFXbHrNSJ47p_i-P-qCKzegtRHrwyelXYv5gi-BWhk2PT5H_8jRkWCLvbTp8GaocFMt9Gl9BKhHFio5OZiaSJqE-Fi6QorIg15dAHvmJfHFBNMwEkvbMY7tjr6vpkZu-huOGgPOPy77KEvGvw==&c=tNoZczjc4zQmlIal1tqmFRNsj3WzJS2Pks-9crdO7X8xb2CmKkTdZQ==&ch=HJ1_Vba0jJtVi_OA0OuRlHIBJgnFY0w15PeIXODfve0y1bld4kRTng==)**

Thank you,

David Perdue

subject: March for 45 with Latinos for Trump December 12 in DC
body:
March for 45 in DC * * * Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be coun
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=274999.1818.1.120d9e0a7d8cfe86ef0b7d902ed6454d) |
---
**March for 45 in DC**
* * *
---
Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be counted! The swamp has done everything possible to eradicate patriotism in our nation. On November 3rd over 70 million Americans cast their vote in support of our president and in support of saving our republic. The swamp has responded by attempting to steal our votes, lie about us in the media, attack our civil liberties with unconstitutional orders, censor our voices, and attack our businesses with unlawful mandates. We must not let this stand. As Americans we have a duty to defend this country in times of adversity and when it is under attack. This IS one of those times. We had over a million patriots show up to DC last time and we need to see that again. This is a call to action for every red-blooded American. We will peacefully assemble at Freedom Plaza in Washington DC at 12pm on December 12th and march for the nation. The whole world is watching. Let them see and hear that the spirit of liberty is not dead in our nation. For God and country! RSVP now! MarchFor45.com
latinosfortrump.us If you have already registered you can still do more. Tell everyone you know about this event. Share it on social media. Gather groups of friends to come. Set up caravans into DC. Do anything and everything in a legal fashion to help us pack the capital of this country. It’s now or never. The march is free and open to the public. Registration is not necessary. However, with the attempts by big tech to shut us down it is imperative that we have other ways to reach out to you so we encourage registration. There will also be other events happening in DC December 11th-13th and we will send you details via email. We are all in this together. God bless YOU ALL!
---
Saturday, December 12, 2020
12 Noon
Freedom Plaza

clean_body: March for 45 in DC Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be coun | | | March for 45 in DC Patriots: We are calling for all patriots loyal to the constitution of the United States of America to show up and be counted! The swamp has done everything possible to eradicate patriotism in our nation. On November 3rd over 70 million Americans cast their vote in support of our president and in support of saving our republic. The swamp has responded by attempting to steal our votes, lie about us in the media, attack our civil liberties with unconstitutional orders, censor our voices, and attack our businesses with unlawful mandates. We must not let this stand. As Americans we have a duty to defend this country in times of adversity and when it is under attack. This IS one of those times. We had over a million patriots show up to DC last time and we need to see that again. This is a call to action for every red-blooded American. We will peacefully assemble at Freedom Plaza in Washington DC at 12pm on December 12th and march for the nation. The whole world is watching. Let them see and hear that the spirit of liberty is not dead in our nation. For God and country! RSVP now! MarchFor45.com latinosfortrump.us If you have already registered you can still do more. Tell everyone you know about this event. Share it on social media. Gather groups of friends to come. Set up caravans into DC. Do anything and everything in a legal fashion to help us pack the capital of this country. It’s now or never. The march is free and open to the public. Registration is not necessary. However, with the attempts by big tech to shut us down it is imperative that we have other ways to reach out to you so we encourage registration. There will also be other events happening in DC December 11th-13th and we will send you details via email. We are all in this together. God bless YOU ALL! Saturday, December 12, 2020 12 Noon Freedom Plaza | | Latinos for Trump | | | | | "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" ©2020 Latinos for Trump | 6725 Fairmont Pkwy num 102 Pasadena Tx 77505 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

name: Team Warner
subject: Your Weekly Update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0d1/248916249/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Hi, Derek --

We hope this email finds you safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to make sure folks know what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate.

**Here 's the latest:**
* **[Mark spoke with health officials and senior living facilities CEOs in Hampton Roads](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0d0/248916249/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wtkr.com/news/leaders-express-concern-over-impacts-of-isolation-on-seniors-in-hampton-roads")** about the impact of COVID-19 on seniors in Virginia and across the country. The group discussed the mental health impacts of isolation, rising insurance costs, and difficulties retaining staff.

* **[Mark spoke out against the firing of Chris Krebs,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0df/248916249/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.theverge.com/2020/11/17/21562844/us-cybersecurity-election-official-christopher-krebs-fired-president-trump")** director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). Krebs worked with leaders on both sides of the aisle to keep the general election free from interference and called this election "the most secure in American history."

* Mark opposed the **[President's attempt to undermine the results of the 2020 election](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0de/248916249/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.msnbc.com/mtp-daily/watch/sen-warner-majority-of-republicans-are-embarrassed-by-what-trump-is-doing-96151109696")** and called on business leaders, Republican lawmakers, and military leaders to call on the President to accept the will of the American people.

* **[The Senate passed Mark's bi-partisan cybersecurity legislation this week.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0dd/248916249/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fcw.com/articles/2020/11/18/iot-cyber-bill-passes-senate.aspx")** With hackers increasingly targeting internet-connected devices, Mark's legislation is an important step forward to protect individual and national security by incorporating basic safeguards into "Internet of Things" products purchased by the federal government. He is optimistic the President will sign this bill into law.

* Mark is focused on making sure the **[American public gets information about the development of a COVID-19 vaccine](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0dc/248916249/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.news10.com/news/lawmakers-look-toward-distribution-as-pfizer-moderna-announce-covid-19-vaccine-results/")** in a fact-based, transparent manner. Mark wants to avoid the spread of misinformation about the pandemic and the vaccine and to make sure that everyone has the resources they need.

Thank you again for your support!

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0db/248916249/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201120_e_1_fl__944__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0da/248916249/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9b3/53d9897e/550827b5/1c88d0d9/248916249/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

body:
Today, we’re celebrating all of the Hoosier families who have chosen to welcome a child into their lives through adoption. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ff06e83e736477fb789e06375798147&_e=1oZyfiD5vR5X1au_sD-rz-B6tBUU_9skd6XrYNWtLkSpKv4G3vg-L5Jy_q46-5rJaqDVMZj8-jwbyuk5CzBgrAUbarAT0a8A7ZxMKpSKzkAjnvd8wmw37RxhdssrP4qighyUJip3fwFey2d9DhP-r5UTshOyiyK1-13pT75a1OZQEw2MlJDNjWFWKqE_k-981obpC-7smRFPvz86Hv90lVavVcgWefDBwPVMhjg26WgLP5xtGVwqtJxlh1ybM15wpJIrijF8-AQFIuzEut1ndgLS2dvNxi6DLUoWqrnyixQn5dn-dXdB8oET3zVOXRSM17GfuRMGHtio5RjOZZs6ASuSUM76Vfc2UuhxM92wYYKVEjRvm6iZk8aeUxJjIkNL6WWP9KeOBgNcgt2PYqOxvEv5IL7IgtnHZoQzj3Iz4aA7fDIA1iw3pWV4IfsIeRhPwOUufbLL0c7LUipLDqTLDeuda9X1DvleNcA5gxBV5bqWlcEoQRgYI_VWrheQV8cm) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

It’s National Adoption Day!

**Today, we’re celebrating all of the Hoosier families that have chosen to welcome a child into their lives through adoption.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ff06e83e736477fb789e06375798147&_e=1oZyfiD5vR5X1au_sD-rz-B6tBUU_9skd6XrYNWtLkSpKv4G3vg-L5Jy_q46-5rJaqDVMZj8-jwbyuk5CzBgrAUbarAT0a8A7ZxMKpSKzkAjnvd8wmw37RxhdssrP4qighyUJip3fwFey2d9DhP-r5UTshOyiyK1-13pT75a1OZQEw2MlJDNjWFWKqE_k-981obpC-7smRFPvz86Hv90lVavVcgWefDBwPVMhjg26WgLP5xtGVwqtJxlh1ybM15wpJIrijF8-AQFIuzEut1ndvZu6-U1tUVlnCNTBaWLXcpKoNA5S11bKS9Edwqsx-dP9BKxxxz-UjILDxovfJfKz6Bph-KdQLA3gom2vhZgVzcDVtf6X26ZCT6mY0ggnLQzyKxQimr7OfZcx-3KY6SevRO_q9JJrxG8-yOYHyLnj1dPwkvWW7G4SGgn6zUZLyWbS3eajV0rnS9N9P5B3z-Xt6x0u_s-gKJI8MUfUIllgvk9oZmZJ8v04Nh86LnZfbbc)
It’s a special day for families across our state, and we want to join them in celebrating.

Making sure that the Hoosier kids in foster care find loving homes has been a priority for Governor Holcomb. **Under his leadership, Indiana leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care and more kids are finding loving forever homes in Indiana every single day. **

It’s one of the accomplishments that we’re most proud of, and we’re overjoyed to spend today celebrating with happy Hoosier families.

Do you have an adoption story you want to share with us? If so, let us know how adoption has changed your life below!
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5ff06e83e736477fb789e06375798147&_e=1oZyfiD5vR5X1au_sD-rz-B6tBUU_9skd6XrYNWtLkSpKv4G3vg-L5Jy_q46-5rJaqDVMZj8-jwbyuk5CzBgrAUbarAT0a8A7ZxMKpSKzkAjnvd8wmw37RxhdssrP4qighyUJip3fwFey2d9DhP-r5UTshOyiyK1-13pT75a1OZQEw2MlJDNjWFWKqE_k-981obpC-7smRFPvz86Hv90lVavVcgWefDBwPVMhjg26WgLP5xtGVwqtJxlh1ybM15wpJIrijF8-AQFIuzEut1ndlKfN63IL84s6laQSkSnbUrJ5s4BTjNBv4IDpuKIlqZUfNd36bDLr1ggQWD_9rAGOyALOXVLCZ9tlGoyPYDV0EClTYOxOPMc_mSBVEtqMSTUVGFkwd0nB0aVbd8UWR99lV0pG0jTzP4uKDYGO2GrUBRiLTU2hmmXADcTMyVK4nn975DVNItz3kjfM35Dg1LvSVNCh_-UkIdm604SOzl3nyIjV_a9Fs54CTfdAK_h4hYd)
Best,

clean_body: Today, we’re celebrating all of the Hoosier families who have chosen to welcome a child into their lives through adoption. | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, It’s National Adoption Day! Today, we’re celebrating all of the Hoosier families that have chosen to welcome a child into their lives through adoption. It’s a special day for families across our state, and we want to join them in celebrating. Making sure that the Hoosier kids in foster care find loving homes has been a priority for Governor Holcomb. Under his leadership, Indiana leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care and more kids are finding loving forever homes in Indiana every single day. It’s one of the accomplishments that we’re most proud of, and we’re overjoyed to spend today celebrating with happy Hoosier families. Do you have an adoption story you want to share with us? If so, let us know how adoption has changed your life below! Best, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Durbin HQ
subject: Georgia is the 🔑 to a Democratic Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Can you believe it, Peter?
Election Day has come and gone, but our fight isn't over yet.
On January 5, the runoffs in Georgia will decide whether we elect a Democratic Senate majority -- or if Mitch McConnell can veto Joe Biden's Cabinet and our people-first Democratic agenda.
**[We need your support to elect Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock in Georgia. Will you rush in a $5 contribution right now to help flip Georgia -- and the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201120i_1112&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
While we celebrate the fact that we beat President Trump -- we can't stop at sending Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House. We still have the opportunity to elect a Senate majority that will work to move this country forward on everything from health care to climate change.
**But we have to win these runoffs in Georgia to get the job done, Peter.**
**[Pitch in $5 or any amount now to help Democrats win the Georgia Senate runoffs.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201120i_1112&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for your support,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201120i_1112&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff44be/42ab3cf4/663b8f44/135de75b/1859244408/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff44be/42ab3cf4/663b8f44/135de75c/1859244408/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654
